UserData.title: UserData
UserData.description: User specific application data including POS inventory, clients, sales, and counters

email.description: The lowercase operating email of the user

products.description: List of products/inventory belonging to the user

clients.description: List of clients registered by the user

ncfCount.description: Object tracking NCF sequences (e.g. B01, B02 counters)

closures.description: List of cash drawer daily closures

lastUpdated.description: ISO timestamp indicating when the document was last changed on a client

/users_data/{email}.description: Direct isolated document per user containing all synced modules
